form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second behind Prioritise at this track over 1790m in a NR 65 or better on March 20 at $17. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing second after a quick start, behind My Ultimate Jimmy at this track over 2190m in a NR 65 or better on March 27 at $41. Sure to be prominent.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr4) over 2190m after being wide early at this track beaten 24 m by My Ultimate Jimmy (2:40.40) in NR 65 or better on March 27 at $11. Two runs back 3rd (Fr2) over 2570m at Charlton beaten 14 m by Miki To Success (3:03.00) in No NR on March 15 at $51. Facing a tough assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room from the 400m mark to the 200m mark.
Pulled hard in running and held up over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Melton over 2240m NR up to 80 on March 14. Last time out 8th (Sr2) over 2240m at Melton beaten 11 m by Always Be Blakey (2:43.90) in NR 75 to 88 on April 4 at $5. Great chance to bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr3) over 2240m at Melton, at the bell was 7th-13.63 beaten 13 m by Meteor Moth (2:39.50) in NR up to 100 on March 28 at $23. Two runs back was well back in the run when 8th (Fr6) over 2570m at Charlton beaten 40 m by Miki To Success (3:03.00) in No NR on March 15 at $41. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered between the 600m and the 400m when trailing the tiring Wicked Mitzi.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Sr2) over 2190m at this track was 7th-9.6 at the bell, beaten 15 m by My Ultimate Jimmy (2:40.40) in NR 65 or better on March 27 at $13. Showed ability the run before when he won by 1.75 m after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (2:40.70) beating My Ultimate Jimmy in NR 67 or better on March 10 at $5 at the bell was leading 2.4. Serious player on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced in the early stages of the race.
Hung in briefly near the 250m contacting two marker pegs.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 2.75 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Melton (3:17.10) beating Captain Perfect in 3yo G1 No NR CG on October 18 at $1.85 at the bell was 3rd-3.5m on the pegs. One of the main contenders.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 1.1 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Melton (2:02.70) beating My Ultimate Barney in NR up to 105 on March 21 at $1.35 at the bell was leading 4.07. Two runs back won by 1.75 m (Sr3) at Melton (2:38.20) beating Viney in 3yo G2 No NR CG on December 13 at $3 at the bell was 2nd-0.8m 2WNC. Further improvement in store.
